owner.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

metadata.description: A personal catalog of MCP servers and developer-workflow plugins for Claude Code, by Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC.

plugins.name: ga-mcp-full
plugins.description: GA4 MCP server with full Admin API read/write access — bundled with Claude Code auth helpers and SessionStart bootstrap.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: claude-quikgif
plugins.description: QuikGIF MCP integration for Claude Code — bundled MCP shim, session-start update notices, and lifecycle slash commands (status, install, update, install-mcp).

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: namecheap-mcp
plugins.description: Namecheap MCP server — manage domains, DNS, SSL, transfers, and account from Claude Code. Includes a guided /namecheap-mcp:setup command for first-run credentials.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: appstore-connect-mcp
plugins.description: App Store Connect MCP server. Query 923 API endpoints and run authenticated calls — apps, reviews, sales reports, TestFlight, beta testers, and more.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: xcode-mcp-server
plugins.description: Xcode MCP server — build projects and run tests from Claude Code with structured output, log persistence, and Xcode 15/16+ compatibility.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: cpanel-mcp
plugins.description: cPanel UAPI MCP server — manage email, DNS, files, MySQL, SSL, cron, subdomains, backups, autoresponders, mail filters, and FTP on shared cPanel hosting. Multi-account profiles with atomic token rotation, dry-run auth_test, cPHulk lockout detection, and a state-machine /cpanel-mcp:setup.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: ableton
plugins.description: Drive Ableton Live 11 and 12 from Claude Code - tracks, clips, MIDI notes, devices, mixer, automation, arrangement, scenes, transport, and preset generation (Wavetable, Simpler, rack macros & zones, and macro->parameter mappings) over a bundled MCP server. Includes a guided /ableton:setup, a /ableton:analyze best-practice set report, plus workflow commands for building and editing tracks.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: notation
plugins.description: Capture session learnings into the right Claude Code memory tier. /notation:notate reads the session first - classifying type, gauging volume, and identifying exercised tiers - then right-sizes the flow and announces the chosen shape before running it. Proposals are presented as a scorecard header plus per-tier tables with diffs below. Pass 'full' to force the complete flow. /notation:notate-all applies every proposal without the picker. /notation:feedback sends a bug, idea, or routing correction to the maintainer as a support ticket. Notation is additive: it preserves existing lines and dates new entries rather than overwriting history. Ships a notation-audit skill with the same structured reporting.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent pull request review that surfaces every finding instead of hiding low-confidence ones. /deep-review:review scores each issue on confidence and severity, verifies impactful-but-uncertain ones, then presents a two-axis triage in-session and posts to the PR on confirm. /deep-review:auto double-checks then auto-applies a fix for every issue to the working tree, runs the repo's local gate to verify them, and confirms every fix survived the run. Works with or without a PR, tolerates a dirty tree without touching unrelated uncommitted work, and never assumes CI exists.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: colab
plugins.description: Drive Google Colab from Claude Code over a bundled MCP server — open Drive notebooks, run code in the kernel, manage multiple sessions, upload/download VM files, mount Drive, read Colab secrets, inspect variables, edit notebook cells, and run fine-tune round-trip + local MLX conversion helpers. Optional headless/Playwright backend. Includes guided /colab:setup and /colab:help commands.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: sharding
plugins.description: Develop a product as isolated shards coupled only through a frozen, versioned contract, with drift caught mechanically. A Claude Code plugin plus a deterministic engine: SessionStart/PreToolUse/Stop hooks sandbox each shard to its own slice and a read-only contract, and /shard-* commands diff a shard's surface against the contract and gate phases.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC

plugins.name: audacity
plugins.description: Drive Audacity from Claude Code - 132 tools plus one-call cleanup and mastering pipelines, with guided setup and diagnostics.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC
